stories.title: The Open Championship: Top third-round sights, sou...
stories.summary: Ryan Fox is in the clubhouse after shooting the third 62 of the tournament. Can Scottie Scheffler, Bryson DeChambeau and local hero Tommy Fleetwood respond to stay in contention?

stories.title: Fox's record-tying 62 the Open's third this week
stories.summary: New Zealand's Ryan Fox tied a major championship record on Saturday by carding a 62, the third player to match the mark this week at the Open Championship.

stories.title: UK's Kerr smashes 27-year-old men's mile record
stories.summary: British runner Josh Kerr broke the long-standing men's mile record at a Diamond League meeting in London on Saturday in a time of 3 minutes, 42.66 seconds.

stories.title: Homa on Bryson penalty: 'He would never cheat'
stories.summary: While Max Homa defended Bryson DeChambeau and other golfers seemed to give him the benefit of doubt following his two-stroke penalty in the second round of The Open, Rory McIlroy didn't mince words when asked whether DeChambeau should have been penalized.

stories.title: Fever's Clark first with 40-point, 10-assist game
stories.summary: Caitlin Clark scored a career-high 45 points and had 10 assists for the first 40-10 game in WNBA history, and the Indiana Fever beat Seattle 110-107.
